name: Extract and Overwrite Main Directory

on:
  push:
    paths:
      - 'eit.zip' # Triggers only when full.zip is updated
  workflow_dispatch: # Allows you to run this manually from the Actions tab

jobs:
  unzip-process:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: write # Required to push changes back to the repo

    steps:
      - name: Checkout Repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Unzip and Overwrite
        run: |
          # -o:Overwrite existing files without prompting
          # -d .: Extract to the current (root) directory
          unzip -o eit.zip -d .
          
          # Optional: Remove the zip after extraction to keep repo clean
            rm eit.zip

      - name: Commit and Push changes
        run: |
          git config --local user.email "ethiomark8@gmail.com"
          git config --local user.name "ETHIO MARK8"
          git add .
          
          # Only commit if there are actual changes to avoid workflow errors
          if git diff --quiet && git diff --staged --quiet; then
            echo "No changes to commit"
          else
            git commit -m "Auto-extract eit.zip and update repository"
            git push
          fi
